title: Speaking - Part 3
description: Discuss the options shown with your partner for about two minutes, then decide together which two would be most effective.

content.task: Discuss the following ways in which traditions can shape and strengthen a community's identity, then decide which two are most important.
options: Celebrating national and religious holidays together
Preserving traditional arts, music and dance
Passing down traditional crafts and skills to younger generations
Sharing traditional food and cuisine across generations
Maintaining traditional ceremonies for important life events

script.text: Now, I'd like you to talk about something together for about two minutes. Here are some ideas related to traditions, identity and globalisation. Discuss the following ways in which traditions can shape and strengthen a community's identity, then decide which two are most important. You have about two minutes for this, so don't worry if I stop you. Please speak so that we can hear you.
Now decide which two are most important..
